privacy.title: Welcome to EsperanzApp
privacy.subtitle: The app works entirely on your phone, no internet needed.

points.noServer: Your data stays on your device

counter.title: Take back control of your habits
counter.body:
Track the habits you want to break free from and count each day without relapse.

Breaking free from a habit is built one day at a time.
Every day without relapse is a small victory!
EsperanzApp walks with you.

relapse.title: A Relapse?
relapse.body: If you relapse on a habit you want to break free from, you can log it in the habit's history.

milestones.title: Milestones on the way...
milestones.body: 1 day, 7, 30, 90 or more... Each milestone is a step forward that will help you on your journey.

private.title: Private by design
private.body: Your data stays on your device unless you choose to export or share it. No account, no remote server, no tracking.

stats.title: Track your progress
stats.body: For each habit, you can view your stats and progress over time.

firstHabit.title: Which habit do you want to break free from?
firstHabit.subtitle: You can add more later.

habits.title: My habits
habits.deleteConfirm: Delete this habit and all its history?
habits.empty:
No habits yet.
Start by adding one.
habits.duplicateWarning: You are already tracking this habit. You cannot add a duplicate.

cannabis.label: Cannabis
cannabis.desc: Recreational use or habit to reduce

social_media.label: Social media
social_media.desc: Instagram, TikTok, X and the rest

gaming.label: Gaming
gaming.desc: Compulsive gaming to take back control of

shopping.label: Compulsive shopping
shopping.desc: Impulsive buying online or in stores

messages.awakening: Day one. This is where it starts.
messages.anchoring: 2 weeks. This is no longer chance, it's a choice.
messages.solidity: One month. You've proven something to yourself.
messages.freedom: 6 months. You're not the same person you were on day one.
messages.fulfilledAwakening: One year. Few people get here. You did.

relapse.title: Start again
relapse.confirmBody: These days are yours. They stay.

messages.before7days: {{name}}, those {{days}} days count. You start again today.
messages.between7and30days: {{name}}, you held on for {{days}} days. This isn't a failure. You know what you're capable of.
messages.after30days: {{name}}, you held on for {{days}} days. That is immense. Everything you learned stays with you.
messages.day0: {{name}}, what matters is trying. Start again when you're ready.

treatments.title: My treatments
treatments.deleteConfirm: Delete this treatment and all its history?
treatments.empty:
No treatments yet.
Add one and set a reminder so you never miss a dose.
treatments.reminderMonthly: On the {{day}} of the month at {{time}}

form.name: Medication name
form.permissionDenied: Notification permission denied. The reminder has been disabled.

export.title: Data
export.importWarningBody: This will permanently delete ALL your existing data and replace it with the contents of the imported file. This cannot be undone.
export.importFileHint:
Select a .json or .csv file.
The format will be detected automatically.
export.privacyWarningTitle: This data is personal and sensitive
export.privacyWarningBody: The exported file contains health information. Once saved to the Documents folder, it may be accessible by other applications or anyone with access to this device.
export.saveConfirmBody: The file will be saved to the app's Documents folder on your phone. On Android 11 and later, accessible via the built-in Files app or USB only.
export.filesystemError: Unable to write file. Check your device storage.
export.documentsUnavailable: Could not save to Documents. Try using Share instead.
export.encryptWarning: This password cannot be recovered. Keep it safe : it will be required to reimport this data.
export.encryptedImportHint: Enter the password used when exporting.
export.importInvalidFile: This file is not a valid EsperanzApp export.
export.importUnsupportedVersion: This file comes from an incompatible version of EsperanzApp.
export.importInconsistentData: The file contains inconsistent data and cannot be imported.
export.importStorageError: The import failed while saving. Your existing data was preserved.
export.importReschedulePermissionDenied: Permission denied : imported reminders will not be scheduled.
export.importFileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum allowed size: 10 MB.
export.fileProtectionHint: Consider protecting your file by enabling password encryption above.

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsDisableHint: To disable, go to your device's app settings.
settings.deleteAllConfirm: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be erased from this device.

startup.dbErrorBody: The database could not be opened. This can happen after an update. You can reset the app: local data will be erased, but you can restore it from an export file.
startup.dbErrorResetFailed: Reset failed. Uninstall and reinstall the app to recover access.

update.availableBody: A new version of EsperanzApp is available. Update now to enjoy the latest improvements.
update.upToDate: The app is up to date
